title: pharbitis hederacea
intro: Pharbitis hederacea, also known as prickly poppy or silverleaf, is a flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is rich in health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Pharbitis hederacea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in salves and ointments for topical application.
